chapter_title.en: Chapter 25 – The seminal fluid and the semen

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/124)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/124)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْمَذْيِ فَقَالَ مَا هُوَ وَ النُّخَامَةُ إِلَّا سَوَاءٌ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Ibn Bukeyr, from Umar Bin Hanzala who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the seminal fluid, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It and the phlegm is nothing but equal’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal from ibn Bukayr from ‘Umar ibn Hanzalah who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about al-Madhiy. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is only like nasal mucus. They are very similar.’”
